rationale.D1: Confirmed full IO layer with TurretIO/TurretIOSim/TurretIOTalonFX pattern across all mechanisms; generic parameterized bases (GenericFlywheel, GenericRoller, Arm, Elevator) in GompeiLib reused across mechanisms — library-grade abstraction, not repeated per-mechanism.
rationale.D2: Per-subsystem state enums (TurretState, IntakeState, HoodState, ShooterGoal) with switch-based FSMs confirmed in Turret.java; composite commands orchestrate intent; no single Superstructure class fanning robot-wide goals to subsystems, so capped at level 2.
rationale.D3: DCMotorSim in TurretIOSim and V1_DoomSpiralSwankIOSim, SingleJointedArmSim in HoodIOSim and FourBarLinkageIOSim confirmed; REPLAY mode wired in Robot.java; maple-sim mentioned as comment but not instantiated — drivetrain sim not fully confirmed.
rationale.D4: 75 test files in lib/src/test but most are empty stubs; 10 files have real @Test methods (SetpointTest, GeometryUtilTest, GompeiLibTest, etc.); lib/build.gradle has JUnit5+jacoco configured; lib is a Gradle subproject included in the season build so tests run in CI, but coverage is utility/math only, not subsystem behavior.
rationale.D5: Confirmed @AutoLog Inputs structs (TurretIOInputs, etc.) and Logger.processInputs called in every subsystem periodic across turret, flywheel, roller, arm, elevator, drive, vision; REAL/SIM/REPLAY modes with WPILOGWriter/NT4Publisher wired in Robot.java — full AK adoption throughout.
rationale.D6: V1_DoomSpiralAutoTrajectoryCache.java confirmed loading 16+ Choreo trajectories via Choreo.loadTrajectory() and using them in auto routines; AutoRoutine/AutoFactory-based chooser (BetterAutoChooser) wired; PathPlanner pathfinding (LocalADStarAK) confirmed in Robot.java.
rationale.D7: Confirmed RobotState class with zone-based multi-estimator Localization (globalZone, blueHubZone, redHubZone, blueTowerZone, redTowerZone); multi-camera limelight fusion via addLocalizerVisionMeasurement with yaw-velocity rejection; vision behind CameraIO interface; lookahead pose and InterpolatingTreeMaps for shot calculation — world model as architecture.
rationale.D8: Spotless formatter confirmed in build.gradle and enforced via lint.yaml CI; lib/ (GompeiLib) synced to an external Team-190/CI-Workflows repo via push/pull workflows; season CI runs build on push/PR; spotless enforced as gate — CI + maintained team library pattern confirmed.
